name: ksk-vasu-shop

scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\app\\build'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\app\\build' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\app\\.cxx'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\app\\.cxx' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\.gradle'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\android\\.gradle' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\.expo'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\.expo' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\dist'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\dist' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\dist-check'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\dist-check' -Recurse -Force}; Write-Output 'mobile build/cache cleaned'"
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\node_modules'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\mobile\\node_modules' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\client\\node_modules'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\client\\node_modules' -Recurse -Force}; if(Test-Path -LiteralPath '.\\node_modules'){Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.\\node_modules' -Recurse -Force}; Write-Output 'all node_modules cleaned'"
scripts.build: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix client

description: KSK VASU & Co - Construction Materials E-commerce
